description: Phase 2 Reliability: Update shared types, keys, DB helpers, and Postgres schema for reliability features (processing list, DLQ, idempotency, retry support)
steps: Update shared/src/keys.ts: Add three new key functions - processing(workerId: string) returning 'nexus:processing:{workerId}', dlq(queueName: string) returning 'nexus:dlq:{queueName}', and idempotency(key: string) returning 'nexus:idem:{key}'.

Update shared/src/types.ts: Add 'idempotencyKey?: string' to the EnqueueOptions interface. Ensure exactOptionalPropertyTypes compatibility (use '?: string | undefined' if needed for the optional property).

Update shared/src/db.ts: Add a new export function markJobDlq(pool, jobId, errorMessage) that updates status to 'dlq' and sets completed_at and error_message. Add a new export function markJobPendingForRetry(pool, jobId) that updates status back to 'pending' and clears started_at and completed_at. Update insertPendingJob to accept an optional idempotencyKey parameter and include it in the INSERT.
Update shared/src/index.ts: Export the new functions markJobDlq and markJobPendingForRetry.
Create infra/postgres/002_reliability.sql: Add idempotency_key column (TEXT, nullable) to jobs table. Add a unique partial index on idempotency_key WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL.
acceptance_criteria: shared/src/keys.ts exports redisKeys.processing(workerId), redisKeys.dlq(queueName), and redisKeys.idempotency(key)
shared/src/types.ts EnqueueOptions includes optional idempotencyKey field
shared/src/db.ts exports markJobDlq and markJobPendingForRetry functions
infra/postgres/002_reliability.sql contains ALTER TABLE and CREATE UNIQUE INDEX
npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/shared compiles without errors
